data.title: After Iran war, attack on Gulf States, will the GCC withdraw from Arab League | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Abdullah Al-Khamis, a Kuwaiti political journalist, proposes an alternative: an Arab coordination council comprising the Gulf states, Jordan, Morocco, and Syria.
data.keywords: oil,iran israel war,iran missiles,Gulf Cooperation Council,Gulf,Gulf States,The Media Line,Iranian missile attacks
